overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator (GTA V), showing a Volvo semi-truck navigating through urban Los Santos streets during golden hour. The driver proceeds through intersections, checks mirrors and surroundings, navigates a roundabout, and continues on open roads with commercial billboards visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and commercial buildings

events.description: proceeds through intersection as traffic light changes to green
turns slightly right while navigating through commercial district

agents.ego_description: driving through urban intersection and proceeding down commercial street with moderate speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red light visible at start of clip
tall white cylindrical water tower visible behind commercial buildings
low-rise commercial buildings with storefronts and signage
palm trees lining the street in the distance against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a traffic light intersection in an urban commercial area. The truck proceeds through the intersection as the light changes, passing a white water tower on the left. The driver follows a black sedan down a multi-lane street lined with commercial buildings and palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial-commercial mixed street with warehouse buildings

events.description: driver looks left to check side mirror and looks out driver side window
returns focus to forward driving position after checking surroundings

agents.ego_description: driving while periodically checking left side mirror and looking out driver side window to survey surroundings

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding
truck side mirror reflecting the road and vehicles behind

segments.scene_description: The truck continues down an industrial-commercial mixed street. The driver checks the left side mirror and looks out the driver side window to survey the surroundings, revealing the interior door panel and side mirror. Industrial warehouse buildings line the right side while commercial facades recede into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: traffic roundabout with pedestrian crossings and central island

events.description: approaches and yields at roundabout entry waiting for gap in traffic
pedestrian crosses in front of vehicle at roundabout exit crossing
navigates through roundabout and takes exit onto arterial road

agents.ego_description: slowing for roundabout, yielding to pedestrians, and navigating the circular intersection with caution

notable_agents.action: person walking across pedestrian crossing at roundabout exit

entered.detail: circular central island with landscaping and small palm tree
zebra crossing markings on road surface at roundabout entry
triangular traffic sign indicating roundabout priority rules

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a traffic roundabout with a landscaped central island. The driver yields at the entry, waiting for a pedestrian to cross at the zebra crossing. After the pedestrian clears, the truck navigates through the roundabout, passing the central island and taking the exit onto a wider arterial road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with commercial billboards and fencing

events.description: exits roundabout onto wider arterial road with less dense development
temporary sun glare from low afternoon sun creates lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open road, passing commercial billboards while following a semi-truck ahead

notable_agents.action: semi-truck driving ahead in same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large red commercial billboard advertising eCola soft drink with white text
metal chain-link fencing running along right side of road
hilly terrain and mountains visible in the background against the sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the roundabout, the truck enters a wider multi-lane arterial road with less dense urban development. A large red eCola billboard is visible on the right side, along with chain-link fencing. The truck follows a semi-truck ahead while driving toward the setting sun, which creates temporary glare and lens flare effects as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a semi-truck moves from a busy urban intersection into a more industrial commercial corridor. It begins at a traffic light, proceeding through the intersection past a white water tower and following a black sedan down a multi-lane street lined with commercial buildings and distant palm trees. As the truck advances, the environment shifts from a dense commercial hub toward a mixed industrial zone characterized by large warehouse buildings on the right. The camera then pivots inward as the driver checks the left side mirror and glances out the window, momentarily revealing the interior door panel before returning focus to the receding facades of the street.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a semi-truck transitions from a cautious urban intersection into a wide, sun-drenched arterial road. It begins with the truck approaching a landscaped roundabout, pausing at a zebra crossing to yield to a pedestrian before merging into the circular flow. As the vehicle exits the roundabout, the environment opens up into a multi-lane road characterized by less dense development and industrial chain-link fencing. The scene then shifts toward a large red eCola billboard on the right as the truck follows another semi-truck forward. Finally, the camera drives directly into the glow of the setting sun, which fills the frame with golden light and intermittent lens flares.
